creator: sballard@icn.state.ia.us
text:
Doing a new install of FreeBSD on a Compaq DL380 using (6) BD03663622 drives.  Get to the point to configure the drives, and the machine states no disks available.  Tried installing older disk drives to mix an match, still did not find any of the drives.  If I install another OS (NT) on the box, I have no problems.

How-To-Repeat: Do a first time install.
